headline: Is It Too Late To Consider GE Vernova (GEV) After 174% One-Year Surge?
summary: Wondering whether GE Vernova at around US$1,095 per share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity has already been priced in. The stock has posted returns of 0.6% over the past week, 21.9% over the last month, 61.2% year to date and 173.6% over the past year, which naturally raises questions about how its current price stacks up against fundamentals. Recent attention on GE Vernova has focused on its role in power and energy infrastructure and on how investors view companies exposed...

headline: GE Vernova Targets Data Center Demand With Texas Hybrid Gas Nuclear Plant
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) and Blue Energy plan a 2.5 GW hybrid gas and nuclear power plant in Texas using small modular reactor technology and gas turbines. The project aims to use offsite prefabrication and a tailored regulatory approach to support quicker deployment in the U.S. power market. The facility is designed to address rising electricity demand from AI data centers and advanced manufacturing while contributing to U.S. grid reliability and energy transition goals. For investors...
